issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Documentation contains verbose explanatory sections that could be trimmed.
Installation script downloaded via curl without verifying checksum.

scenarios.name: Private offline code assistant on a laptop
scenarios.rationale: One response gestures at llama.cpp / GGUF / Hugging Face downloads with no Modelfile workflow; the other installs via the official script, pulls codellama, builds a custom Modelfile with FROM/SYSTEM/PARAMETER + ollama create, and connects via the OpenAI SDK at http://localhost:11434/v1.

scenarios.name: On-prem RAG pipeline with no cloud LLM dependency
scenarios.rationale: One response defaults to OpenAI embeddings or vague HuggingFace+FAISS code without keeping inference local; the other uses ollama.embed for embeddings and ollama.chat for generation against http://localhost:11434, with ChromaDB as a local vector store — fully on-prem.
